title: Orland
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Sith Empire |image=[[File:Orland.jpg]] |name=Orland |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]][[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] **[[407th Stormtrooper Division]] ***[[Joker Squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|There's ''nothing'' here, Sergeant Harkas.''"
"''We're still ''checking'' this hole, Private Orland. Or do ''you'' want to make the report to Stryfe and tell him we didn't look under every stinkin' rock? Didn't think so.|Orland and Sergeant Ran Harkas, while on Ossus|}} [[Private/Legends|Private]] '''Orland''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in [[Joker Squad]], a fighting [[Squad/Legends|squadron]] of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], in [[137 ABY]]. Orland was with the Jokers when they were dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] in search of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] refugees at the world's abandoned [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Temple]]. Orland found nothing, and when the other Jokers reported similar results, they returned to a waiting [[Unidentified Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyer]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], satisfied that the temple was empty. Nevertheless, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Stryfe]] ordered the temple [[Destruction of Ossus Jedi Academy|destroyed]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Lord Stryfe, the last of the patrols are returning to the ship now. There is no sign of anyone below on the planet.|Imperial [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Meeshal]], reporting on the activities of Orland and the rest of Joker Squad on Ossus|}} Orland was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. In [[137 ABY]], Orland was a [[Private/Legends|private]] in [[Joker Squad]], a fighting [[Squad/Legends|squadron]] of the Empire's [[407th Stormtrooper Division]] under the command of [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Ran Harkas]].[[Legacy (2006) 4|''Legacy'' (2006) 4]] That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Jokers were part of an Imperial force led by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Stryfe]] that was dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] to search the world's former [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Temple]]. Although the temple was widely believed abandoned following an [[Massacre at Ossus|attack]] by [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]][[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]] [[130 ABY|seven years prior]],[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] Stryfe suspected it was a haven for [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] survivors. While Stryfe waited aboard a [[Unidentified Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyer]] in Ossus's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], Orland and the rest of the Jokers searched the temple and its surroundings on the planet's surface. Orland found nothing and reported such to Harkas, who reminded the Private that Stryfe demanded thoroughness. Meanwhile, [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Anson Trask]] and [[Unidentified Joker Squad stormtrooper (sub-basement)|one other]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] stumbled across a group of hidden [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in a sub-basement of the temple, but the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Shado Vao]] used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to cloud their thoughts and convince them that the temple was indeed abandoned. Satisfied, Joker Squad returned to the [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyer]] and reported its lack of findings, but an unconvinced Stryfe ordered an [[Destruction of Ossus Jedi Academy|orbital bombardment]] of the temple. ==Personality and traits== Like the other members of Joker Squad, Orland wore [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]] and carried an [[ARC-9965 blaster rifle]]. The Private was skeptical that any Jedi would be found on Ossus but did not want to undertake a less-than-thorough search and incur the consequent wrath of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Stryfe. ==Behind the scenes== Orland appears in the [[Legacy (2006) 17|seventeenth issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''. Written by [[John Ostrander]] and penciled by [[Jan Duursema]], the issue was released in [[October]] [[2007]]. A nameless stormtrooper is seen with Ran Harkas and Anson Trask on Ossus in ''Legacy''{{'s}} [[Legacy (2006) 16|sixteenth issue]], but it is unclear if the trooper is Orland or another member of Joker Squad. ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Orland |es=Orland |pl=Orland }} [[Category:Enlisted stormtroopers of Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Members of Joker Squad]]
